clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the generation, processing, and experiencing of valenced states and mood, typically mapping onto the overarching salience and limbic networks.
These terms delineate the computation of expected utility, incentive processing, and goal-directed choice, primarily subserved by mesolimbic and frontostriatal reward circuitry.
This domain encompasses internally directed, self-referential, and interpersonal conceptualizations of mind, which robustly and consistently co-activate within the default mode network.
